positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for yale_pos
% SZS output start Proof for yale_pos
1. private_ivy_league_research_univ(yale_university) [input(axiom)]
2. moved_to(yale_university,new_haven) [input(axiom)]
4. ? [X0] : (private_ivy_league_research_univ(X0) & moved_to(X0,new_haven)) [input(conjecture)]
5. ~? [X0] : (private_ivy_league_research_univ(X0) & moved_to(X0,new_haven)) [negated conjecture 4]
6. ! [X0] : (~private_ivy_league_research_univ(X0) | ~moved_to(X0,new_haven)) [ennf transformation 5]
7. private_ivy_league_research_univ(yale_university) [cnf transformation 1]
8. moved_to(yale_university,new_haven) [cnf transformation 2]
10. ~moved_to(X0,new_haven) | ~private_ivy_league_research_univ(X0) [cnf transformation 6]
11. ~private_ivy_league_research_univ(yale_university) [resolution 8,10]
12. $false [forward subsumption resolution 11,7]
% SZS output end Proof for yale_pos
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for yale_neg
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u11,axiom,
    yale_university != new_haven).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define private_ivy_league_research_univ(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define moved_to(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
